rationale: The citing paper’s core design is a Bayesian state-space model of dynamic/carryover marketing communication effects with endogeneity control, and the cited paper is explicitly a multivariate dynamic linear (state-space) system for long-term marketing effects with endogeneity/feedback controls. That strong methodological and substantive overlap (long-run marketing dynamics) makes this citation plausibly foundational or method-relevant rather than an obvious incidental mention, even though only DOI-level match evidence is available.
